script_text: Authors sometimes try to convince us of something.
They make a point, then give us reasons why.
Listen. You should drink water every day.
Water helps your body work well.
And it keeps you from getting thirsty.
Two reasons! That is how authors back up their point.
Dogs make great pets. Here is why.
Three reasons that back up the point!
When the author says because, for example, or first and second, those are reasons!
Now you are ready to find author reasons!
